leadText: The Lax Incense (Japanese: のんきのおこう Carefree Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It is an incense that allows Wobbuffet to produce Wynaut Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Bright Powder.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Reduces the accuracy of moves targeting the holder by 5% of what their accuracy would be otherwise. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Reduces the accuracy of moves targeting the holder by 10% of what their accuracy would be otherwise. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Wobbuffet Egg , a Wynaut Egg is produced instead.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Reduces the accuracy of moves targeting the holder by 5% of what their accuracy would be otherwise. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Reduces the accuracy of moves targeting the holder by 10% of what their accuracy would be otherwise.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A hold item that slightly lowers the foe's accuracy. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . Its tricky aroma slightly reduces the foe's accuracy. D P Pt HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. The tricky aroma of this incense lowers the foe's accuracy. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. The tricky aroma of this incense may make attacks miss the holder. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. The beguiling aroma of this incense may cause attacks to miss its holder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. The curious aroma of this incense may cause moves to miss its holder.
